checkpoint.resumeInstruction: Discovery for 2026-05-10-model-evaluation-capability is approved and benefit-metric is active. Follow the four-step priority sequence in pendingActions in order. Do not skip the challenger pre-check on the SKILL.md proposal before running EXP-003. wucp stories (wucp.1/2/4) are ready for /review and can be run in parallel with the EXP work.
pendingActions: PRIORITY 1 — Challenger pre-check on discovery SKILL.md proposal: Read workspace/proposals/proposed-discovery-skill-update-exp-002b.md. Before applying any SKILL.md change, run the improvement-agent challenger pre-check to confirm the three proposed changes (constraint surfacing rule D5/D7, success observability rule D6, /clarify trigger D2) are not regressions. If pre-check passes: proceed to Priority 2. If fails: note the specific failure and stop.

PRIORITY 2 — Apply SKILL.md change if challenger passes: Edit .github/skills/discovery/SKILL.md with the three changes specified in workspace/proposals/proposed-discovery-skill-update-exp-002b.md. Artefact-first route: short-track via /test-plan -> /definition-of-ready -> coding agent. The proposal specifies exact insertion locations.

PRIORITY 3 — /definition pre-check before EXP-003: Read .github/skills/definition/SKILL.md lines 60-90 and lines 410-425. Confirm exactly how architecture-guardrails.md is read. Check workspace/experiments/EXP-003-pipeline-eval/manifest.md for whether Config B includes architecture-guardrails.md as a context-files parameter. If harness would inject the 96KB file: update the EXP-003 manifest to extract relevant sections only.

PRIORITY 4 — EXP-003 end-to-end pipeline eval: Run EXP-003 Config A (baseline), Config B (Opus front-loaded), Config C (cost-optimised). Primary metric: CPF (constraint propagation fidelity) across discovery -> definition -> test-plan -> DoR chain. Record in workspace/experiments/EXP-003-pipeline-eval/scorecard.md.

PARALLEL — wucp /review pipeline: wucp.1 (context auto-loader), wucp.2 (slash command router), wucp.4 (session start wizard) are all reviewReady: true with no spike dependency. Can run /review on these in parallel with EXP work.
